scripts.bench: bun run --cwd memorybench src/index.ts run -p gspot -b locomo -j openrouter-deepseek-v4-pro -m openrouter-deepseek-v4-pro --concurrency 1 --concurrency-ingest 1 --concurrency-search 1 --concurrency-answer 1 --concurrency-evaluate 1
scripts.bench:100:gspot: bun run --cwd memorybench src/index.ts run -p gspot -b locomo -l 100 -j openrouter-deepseek-v4-pro -m openrouter-deepseek-v4-pro --concurrency 1 --concurrency-indexing 1 --concurrency-search 4 --concurrency-answer 4 --concurrency-evaluate 4
scripts.bench:100:supermemory: bun run --cwd memorybench src/index.ts run -p supermemory -b locomo -l 100 -j openrouter-deepseek-v4-pro -m openrouter-deepseek-v4-pro --concurrency 1 --concurrency-indexing 1 --concurrency-search 4 --concurrency-answer 4 --concurrency-evaluate 4
scripts.bench:smoke: bun run --cwd memorybench src/index.ts run -p gspot -b locomo -j openrouter-deepseek-v4-pro -m openrouter-deepseek-v4-pro -l 1 --force --concurrency 1 --concurrency-ingest 1 --concurrency-search 1 --concurrency-answer 1 --concurrency-evaluate 1
scripts.bench:questions: bun run --cwd memorybench src/index.ts list-questions -b locomo -l 10
